evaluator_note: The package states that all feature selection, cutoffs, coefficient signs, and missing-value rules used all 72 patients before the split, so the subset is not independent and performance is optimistically biased.
The package states that 46,218 cells from eight patients were treated as independent observations and requires patient-level pseudobulk or mixed-model inference.
The package states that 31 deaths were used with 27 genes plus 18 covariates, stepwise selection, no sample-size rationale, and no stability or optimism correction.
The package states that median survivor follow-up was 18 months, many three-year outcomes were unavailable, and a censoring-aware time-dependent estimand with at-risk counts is required.
The package states that the eight-tumour cross-sectional EVA1/T-cell-score association cannot establish exclusion, direction, or temporal order.
The package states that one guide without an independent perturbation, rescue, target engagement, or immune-cell assay cannot establish EVA1-specific immune causality.

The package states that five-per-group cage-order allocation, unblinded measurement, no replicate, and universal anti-PD-1 exposure cannot isolate sensitization; it requires a randomized, blinded, replicated 2-by-2 design.
The package explicitly reconciles the conflicting 0.91, 0.84, and 0.86 AUC values as an unresolved internal inconsistency.

The package states that a retrospective resection-survival cohort without treatment comparison, calibration, clinical baselines, decision analysis, or treatment interaction cannot support actionability or anti-PD-1 selection.
The package states that nominal screening of thousands of genes without FDR control invalidates the candidate pool and requires multiplicity-controlled inference.

The package states that committee and protocol identifiers, consent or waiver, animal approval, and humane endpoints are unreported and therefore governance cannot be verified, without asserting that approval was absent.
The package states that absent raw and processed data, coefficients, code, seeds, versions, and analysis data prevent independent reconstruction and audit.

The package states that the “none” and “first” claims are unsupported by the supplied two-reference packet and correctly leaves field-wide priority NOT ASSESSABLE pending a comparative literature analysis.

The package separately identifies the visible mismatch between reference 1 and the field-wide negative claim and between reference 2 and score-specific anti-PD-1 monotherapy benefit, while reserving exact full-text support as not assessable.
The package states that one virally enriched centre, two cell lines, and one Huh7 xenograft do not support universal application across aetiologies or treatment settings.
The package explicitly identifies missing confidence intervals and an unchecked proportional-hazards assumption and requires intervals and PH diagnostics.

The package identifies missing biological-unit definitions, denominators, group sizes, and uncertainty in the legends and separately identifies the cell-versus-patient unit problem, requiring patient-aware summaries and complete reporting.
The package applies Nature’s interdisciplinary outstanding-importance bar, finds the current breadth insufficient, and presents a scientific fit posture rather than a certain editorial decision.
